title: EQ - Select a value, close the EQ tab, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: Verify that the selected EQ value persists after closing and reopening the EQ tab for all EQ options (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
steps: 1. Open the EQ tab in the application.
2. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
5. Verify that the previously selected EQ value is still displayed and selected.
6. Repeat steps 1-5 for each of the following EQ values: Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ.
expected: The previously selected EQ value persists and is displayed as selected after reopening the EQ tab, for all EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
